title: Defining and Delimiting the Exemptions for Executive, Administrative, Professional, Outside Sales, and Computer Employees
body_excerpt: DATES: This rule is effective July 1, 2024. SUMMARY: The Department of Labor is updating and revising the regulations issued under section 13(a)(1) of the Fair Labor Standards Act implementing the exemption from minimum wage and overtime pay requirements for executive, administrative, and professional employees. The standard salary level will increase to $844 per week beginning on July 1, 2024, and the second component of the update is effective on January 1, 2025, when the standard salary level rises to $1,128 per week.
